prompt: Edit image 1 for object detection visualization. Overlay a bounding box on a side view red car based on image 2 near the sketch. Add a front view red car segmentation mask inspired by image 3 elsewhere, showing multi-perspective detection data.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the car sketch, to demonstrate object detection visualization. Overlay a bounding box around a side view red car, rendered in a flat, cartoon-like style similar to image 2, positioned to the left of the central car sketch in image 1. Additionally, add a pixel-level segmentation mask for a front view red car, also rendered in a flat, cartoon-like style consistent with image 3, placed in the top-right corner of image 1. This setup should illustrate multi-perspective detection data.
objects: Side view red car, flat, cartoon-like style (positioned to the left of the central car sketch)
Bounding box (around the side view red car)
Front view red car, flat, cartoon-like style (placed in the top-right corner)
Pixel-level segmentation mask (for the front view red car)
